title: jasione maritima var. sessiliflora
intro: Jasione maritima var. sessiliflora, also known as Sea Lavender or Sessile-flowered Sea Lavender, is a plant species within the Jasione maritima species, characterized by its unique sessile flowers and distinctive grey-green foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Jasione maritima var. sessiliflora include relief from colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as soothing skin irritations and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
